working_on: Phase 5 master plan session per ADR 0051: author engine/session/auto_target.json (executable contract for routine-mode dispatch) and engine/build_readiness/phase_5.md (rationale doc covering Tier 1/2/3 triage). The master plan session is the gate session for Phase 5 per ADR 0040.
declared_scope: Phase 5 master plan per approved plan at ~/.claude/plans/scalable-bouncing-hammock.md. Land: (1) GitHub Issue #4 for mid-session context-pressure signal as enhancement; (2) new product ADR 0052 ratifying 9-subdomain Phase 5 decomposition; (3) ROUTING.md prefix scheme extension (epistemology/ethics/metaphysics/mind/services/cross-bridges retained; language/science/logic/political/aesthetics added; Phase 6 bumped to 0120-0129); (4) ROADMAP.md Phase 5.1 list updated to 9 subjects + services + cross-bridges + closeout; (5) build_plan/P_4_seed_graph_build.md sub-sessions list and success criteria updated for 9 subjects; (6) engine/build_readiness/phase_5.md mirroring phase_4_graph_validation.md structure with full Tier 1/2/3 triage; (7) engine/session/auto_target.json with 16 explicit tasks (epi/ethics/metaphysics/mind pre-split, target_id T-PHASE-5, max_sessions 18, paused false); (8) STATE.md and ENGINE_LOG.md updates; (9) cold-context review pass; (10) full validate.py + check_target.py + check_routine_scope.py + pytest validation. Out of scope: implementing the mid-session context-pressure signal (Issue #4, deferred to later); flipping routine from Manual to Hourly (user action post-S-0045); authoring any Phase 5 seed migrations (deferred to routine-mode execution). phase: NA-master-plan-phase-5.
outcome_summary: Phase 5 master plan landed end-to-end per ADR 0051's two-layer architecture. New product ADR 0052 ratifies 9-subdomain decomposition (epistemology, metaphysics, logic, ethics, political philosophy, aesthetics, philosophy of mind, philosophy of language, philosophy of science) + service nodes + cross-bridges + closeout = 16 explicit tasks (epistemology/ethics/metaphysics/mind pre-split into core/specialized halves at master-plan time per auto_target.schema.md:149's session-sized-task discipline; routine sessions have no live context-pressure signal). Canon-realignment per ADR 0049 no-silent-absorption: ROADMAP.md Phase 5.1, build_plan/P_4_seed_graph_build.md, ROUTING.md (5 new subject ranges; Phase 6 relocated 0070-0079 → 0120-0129), product/adr/README.md. engine/build_readiness/phase_5.md authored with 7 Tier 1 + 8 Tier 2 + 7 Tier 3 entries; cold-context review pass surfaced one citation drift in T2-D (scope_lock prose understated PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md/ROUTING.md coverage across all subdomain tasks); fixed. engine/session/auto_target.json authored: target_id T-PHASE-5, max_sessions 18, paused false, 16 tasks with tight scope_lock globs and depends_on graph (P5-01a anchor; b-halves on a-halves; subjects parallel after P5-01a; P5-11 on all subjects+services; P5-12 on P5-11). Issue #4 filed (enhancement): mid-session context-pressure signal — out of scope, decoupled from S-0045. Fix-in-context: check_target.py _check_validate_passes was treating validate.py exit 1 as fail; per schema doc passes iff zero hard-fails; fixed exit 0 OR 1 → pass; 3 regression tests added; pytest 516 → 519 passing. Validator clean (23 checks, 0 hard-fails, 4 expected issue_collision soft-warns from Issues #1/#2/#3/#4). MemPalace decision drawer captured (drawer_paideia_decisions_90dcc80f406b1a200bce7b9f). ADR count 50 → 51 (engine 16 / product 35). User flips paideia-engine-loop Manual → Hourly post-session for S-0046+ routine execution.

scope_delivery.explanation: All 14 declared deliverables landed: (1) Issue #4 filed before eager-claim per ADR 0048 in-band-discovery authorization. (2) ADR 0052 authored with full Nygard template; product/adr/README.md index entry. (3) ROUTING.md prefix scheme extended with 5 new subdomain ranges plus Phase 6 relocation to 0120-0129. (4) ROADMAP.md Phase 5.1 list rewritten with 9 subjects + 3 operational tasks per ADR 0052. (5) build_plan/P_4_seed_graph_build.md sub-sessions list and success criteria updated; load-bearing ADR list extended; sequencing rewritten around depends_on graph; Paperclip subsection rewritten as 'Paperclip status (rejected)'. (6) phase_5.md authored with full Tier 1/2/3 triage; cold-context review pass surfaced T2-D citation drift fixed in same session. (7) auto_target.json authored with 16 explicit tasks. (8) STATE.md last-session pointer updated; next-session work item rewritten as 'S-0046+ first routine-mode session' with the routine-boot procedure documented. (9) ENGINE_LOG.md [Unreleased] gains Added/Changed entries. (10-12) Validation green: validate.py 23 checks 0 hard-fails 4 expected issue_collision soft-warns; check_target.py validates all 16 tasks (migration_applied unverifiable without SUPABASE_DB_URL but reports 'cannot verify' gracefully; adr_status for ADR 0052 PASSES; file_exists for phase_5_closeout.md correctly fails since closeout file doesn't exist yet); check_routine_scope.py correctly skips (not in routine mode); pytest 519/519 passing. (13) Cold-context review pass complete. (14) Mid-session fix-in-context: check_target.py _check_validate_passes schema-doc-mismatch fixed plus 3 regression tests. MemPalace decision drawer captured for ADR 0052. No descope; no reorder; no user-directed mid-session expansion beyond the plan-approved deliverables.
